tweets.text:
Strait of Hormuz over the last 24 hours: calm before the storm.

Following yesterday's escort, there was nothing today. Traffic visibly dropped.

The US gave Iran 24 hours to make a public statement about how the Strait of Hormuz is open, and there will be no further attacks on commercial vessels. 

But as you have all seen from my daily updates, the Oman lane was always going to be contested, so this is not new. The fact that the US issued another ultimatum just means escalation is inevitable. This comes after President Trump said that the ceasefire is no longer in place.

Regardless, inbound tankers have been nonexistent for the last 5 days. This will force Gulf producers to shut-in production again. 

This is an all-or-nothing conflict. Let's see how this weekend unfolds. 

I have included the video from @MarineTraffic and my table for inbound tankers below.
tweets.full_text:

Regardless, inbound tankers have been nonexistent for the last 5 days. This will force Gulf producers to shut-in production again. 

This is an all-or-nothing conflict. Let's see how this weekend unfolds.

tweets.text:
The devil is in the details. 
This chart is making the rounds supporting the claims that younger generations are struggling relative to previous generations.  But read closer the analysis:
- Taking as a baseline the Greatest Generation, which was born between 1900 and 1927, 
-the Silent Generation earned 34% more, 
- the Boomers made a cumulative 70% more, 
- Gen X took home 97% more and 
- Millennials brought in 133% more than the Greatest Generation even when adjusted for inflation. 

The data also shows that 
- the Silent Generation worked 14% more hours than the generation before 
- and Boomers worked another 14% more. 
- However, working hours have been relatively stable for generations since.
@adamtaggart
tweets.full_text:

tweets.text:
Yesterday, we noted that ETF flows have exceeded $1 Trillion in the first half of this year (~40% above the previous annual record).  US Listed ETF launches are also running well above trend with 770 launches this year and 5400 in existence. (There are more ETFs than publicly traded equities).
I am sure there is a warning in here somewhere. 🤔

tweets.text:
I have been posting updates on earnings estimates looking forward into year-end. The latest update shows the next 3-quarters continue to increase.  Those increases in forward estimates support current valuations, but also rising at a pace usually only seen coming out of recessionary downturns. 
h/t @thedailyshot
